    Feb 17, 2025

    Pepecoin breaks 2k nodes

    From the https://pepecoin-nodes.com/ site, Pepecoin now has over 2000 nodes.

    Feb 16, 2025

    NonKYC delisting Pepecoin

    It was announced in the Pepecoin Discord to not hold coins on exchanges which is good advice to follow for any crypto coin.

    Feb 11, 2025

    Xeggex exchange is down

    The crypto exchange Xeggex is down, and it has been reported that some crypto coins (not $PEP) have been moved out of their exchange wallets.

    Feb 09, 2025

    Pepecoin subreddit hits over 25k members

    Visit the subreddit today and join: https://www.reddit.com/r/pepecoin/

    Feb 03, 2025

    Pepecoin Turns 1 years old

    Pepecoin turns 1 year old today. The project has come really far in the last year and the community keeps building every day.
